purpose.statement: Provide a clear, evidence-aware register of risks associated with a service, initiative, or change, without asserting mitigation completeness or risk acceptance.
This document supports awareness and discussion - it does not approve risk.
Where human harm is material, use references/harm-framework.xml and reference the relevant HT IDs explicitly.

template_block.name: scope
template_block.title: Scope
template_block.statement: Only risks explicitly provided or agreed for inclusion should appear.

checklist.entry: Impact and likelihood are qualitative unless stated otherwise.
Absence of controls does not imply negligence.
Residual harm and residual uncertainty must be recorded explicitly.
Where human harm is material, do not collapse it into generic delivery risk language.

template_block.name: evidence-references-if-any
template_block.title: Evidence references (if any)
template_block.statement: List any reports, metrics, audits, harms reviews, or research referenced. If none exist, state “No formal evidence provided”.

template_block.name: linting-rules-machine-readable-yaml
template_block.title: Linting Rules (Machine-Readable YAML)
template_block.statement: risk_register_integrity: description: > Risk registers must surface uncertainty and exposure, not assert that risks are resolved or accepted. rule: Reject outputs that imply risk approval or sign-off.
risks_must_be_descriptive_not_solutions: description: Risk descriptions must not embed solutions or mitigations. disallowed_terms:
affected_parties_required_when_human_harm_material: description: Material human harm entries must name affected parties. severity: error
harm_refs_required_when_human_harm_material: description: Material human harm entries must reference at least one HT category or explicitly state why none apply. severity: error
residual_uncertainty_required: description: Each listed risk must include residual harm or residual uncertainty. severity: error
escalation_required_for_safeguarding_or_immediate_risk: description: Safeguarding or immediate safety risks must include a named escalation owner or trigger. severity: error
unknowns_required_when_incomplete: description: Missing impact, likelihood, or controls must be marked as Unknown. severity: error
If any lint rule is violated, the assistant must rewrite its output before responding.
